name: Cold Chain & Perishables Logistics
student_summary: Move vaccines, dairy and produce without breaking the cold chain.
overview: Move vaccines, dairy and produce without breaking the cold chain. Cold Chain & Perishables Logistics sits in the Supply Chain family of Transportation, Logistics & Supply Chain. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You are drawn to supply chain and want a broad path you can shape
who_should_avoid: You want a laptop-anywhere lifestyle — this work happens in person
daily_responsibilities: Apply temperature-controlled ops to real problems
Collaborate with your team using compliance
Keep improving at network design — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Primarily on-site — offices, facilities or the field depending on the role
problem_solving_style: Adaptive — mix analysis, action and people skills as the situation demands
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
A broad Supply Chain foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Location-bound work; postings and relocation are part of the deal
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Cold Chain & Perishables Logistics is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of compliance
projects: Beginner: explore temperature-controlled ops with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Reefer systems
smaller_city_scope: Viable in smaller cities — demand exists well beyond the metros.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Supply Chain Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Food Safety & Quality: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Pharmacy: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Cold Chain & Perishables Logistics pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹4 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹10 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Physics, Biology. Typical degrees: SCM degrees + cold-chain specialization. Alternatives exist: operations floor → manager ladder.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Cold Chain & Perishables Logistics evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Cold Chain & Perishables Logistics is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
